title: Splash Hits
company: City of Brighton and Hove Swimming Club
description: Splash Hits - a pop fuelled artistic swimming show full of colour, rhythm and flair. Come show the swimmers from the City of Brighton and Hove SC, Brighton Dolphin SC and Horsham's Atlantis Flamingos ‘a whole lotta love’ by watching them deliver high energy, big water entertainment to the greatest hits from the past few decades. A toe-tapping evening suitable for all the family, prepare to see a show that even Simon Cowell would say has got talent - Now That's What I Call Synchro 2026! We dare you not sing along...
